title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at L&T Realty

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at L&T Realty
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
